description: Create final 6-panel comprehensive evidence figure for the report
code:
import matplotlib
matplotlib.use('Agg')
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import numpy as np

fig = plt.figure(figsize=(20, 12))
fig.suptitle('Comprehensive Evidence: GO:0080043 (quercetin 3-O-GlcT) is Incorrect for UGT85A2_0', 
             fontsize=16, fontweight='bold', y=0.98)

# Create grid: 2 rows x 3 columns
gs = fig.add_gridspec(2, 3, hspace=0.35, wspace=0.35)

# ===== Panel A: Pairwise Identity =====
ax1 = fig.add_subplot(gs[0, 0])
comparisons = [
    ('7-DLGT\n(iridoid)', 57.9, '#2196F3'),
    ('7-DLGT-2\n(iridoid)', 57.7, '#2196F3'),
    ('UGT85A2\n(A.thal)', 37.0, '#4CAF50'),
    ('UGT85A1\n(cytokinin)', 36.0, '#4CAF50'),
    ('UGT78D1\n(Q-3-GlcT)', 26.9, '#F44336'),
    ('UGT78D2\n(Q-3-GlcT)', 26.7, '#F44336'),
]
names_a = [c[0] for c in comparisons]
ids = [c[1] for c in comparisons]
colors = [c[2] for c in comparisons]
bars = ax1.barh(range(len(names_a)), ids, color=colors, edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.5)
ax1.set_yticks(range(len(names_a)))
ax1.set_yticklabels(names_a, fontsize=9)
ax1.set_xlabel('Global Identity (%)', fontsize=10)
ax1.set_title('A. Sequence Identity\n(Needleman-Wunsch)', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold')
ax1.set_xlim(0, 70)
for bar, val in zip(bars, ids):
    ax1.text(val + 1, bar.get_y() + bar.get_height()/2, f'{val}%', va='center', fontsize=9, fontweight='bold')
ax1.invert_yaxis()
# Add dividing line
ax1.axvline(x=30, color='gray', linestyle='--', alpha=0.5, label='Twilight zone')

# ===== Panel B: PSPG Motif Identity =====
ax2 = fig.add_subplot(gs[0, 1])
pspg_data = [
    ('7-DLGT', 75.0, '#2196F3'),
    ('UGT85A1', 70.5, '#4CAF50'),
    ('UGT85A2', 65.9, '#4CAF50'),
    ('UGT78D2', 65.9, '#F44336'),
    ('UGT78D1', 56.8, '#F44336'),
]
bars2 = ax2.barh(range(len(pspg_data)), [d[1] for d in pspg_data], 
                  color=[d[2] for d in pspg_data], edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.5)
ax2.set_yticks(range(len(pspg_data)))
ax2.set_yticklabels([d[0] for d in pspg_data], fontsize=9)
ax2.set_xlabel('PSPG Motif Identity (%)', fontsize=10)
ax2.set_title('B. PSPG Motif (44 aa)\nUDP-Sugar Binding', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold')
ax2.set_xlim(0, 90)
for bar, val in zip(bars2, [d[1] for d in pspg_data]):
    ax2.text(val + 1, bar.get_y() + bar.get_height()/2, f'{val}%', va='center', fontsize=9, fontweight='bold')
ax2.invert_yaxis()

# ===== Panel C: K-mer Similarity =====
ax3 = fig.add_subplot(gs[0, 2])
kmer_labels = ['7-DLGT\n(iridoid)', 'UGT85A1\n(cytokinin)', 'UGT78D1\n(Q-3-GlcT)']
nterm_kmer = [8.4, 1.0, 0.2]
cterm_kmer = [10.6, 3.3, 1.4]
x = np.arange(len(kmer_labels))
w = 0.35
b1 = ax3.bar(x - w/2, nterm_kmer, w, label='N-term (acceptor)', color='#FF9800', edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.5)
b2 = ax3.bar(x + w/2, cterm_kmer, w, label='C-term (donor/PSPG)', color='#9C27B0', edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.5)
ax3.set_xticks(x)
ax3.set_xticklabels(kmer_labels, fontsize=9)
ax3.set_ylabel('Shared 4-mers (%)', fontsize=10)
ax3.set_title('C. K-mer Similarity\nby Domain', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold')
ax3.legend(fontsize=8, loc='upper right')

# ===== Panel D: Experimental Evidence by Family =====
ax4 = fig.add_subplot(gs[1, 0])
families = ['UGT71', 'UGT73', 'UGT76', 'UGT78', 'UGT88', 'UGT89', 'UGT72', 'UGT85']
exp_counts = [7, 5, 4, 3, 1, 1, 1, 0]
fam_colors = ['#4CAF50' if c > 0 else '#F44336' for c in exp_counts]
bars4 = ax4.bar(range(len(families)), exp_counts, color=fam_colors, edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.5)
ax4.set_xticks(range(len(families)))
ax4.set_xticklabels(families, fontsize=9, rotation=45, ha='right')
ax4.set_ylabel('# with IDA Evidence', fontsize=10)
ax4.set_title('D. Experimental GO:0080043\nby UGT Family', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold')
bars4[-1].set_edgecolor('red')
bars4[-1].set_linewidth(2.5)
ax4.annotate('ZERO\nin UGT85', xy=(7, 0.3), fontsize=11, fontweight='bold', color='red', ha='center')

# ===== Panel E: IEA vs Experimental =====
ax5 = fig.add_subplot(gs[1, 1])
cats = ['Experimental\n(23 proteins)', 'Automated IEA\n(28,355 proteins)']
vals = [23, 28355]
cols = ['#4CAF50', '#F44336']
bars5 = ax5.bar(cats, vals, color=cols, edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.5, width=0.6)
ax5.set_ylabel('Annotation Count', fontsize=10)
ax5.set_title('E. GO:0080043 Annotations\nGlobal Scope', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold')
ax5.set_yscale('log')
ax5.set_ylim(1, 100000)
for bar, val in zip(bars5, vals):
    ax5.text(bar.get_x() + bar.get_width()/2, val * 1.5, f'{val:,}', 
             ha='center', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold')
ax5.annotate('1,233x\nratio', xy=(0.5, 500), fontsize=12, ha='center', 
             color='red', fontweight='bold',
             bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.3', facecolor='lightyellow', edgecolor='red'))

# ===== Panel F: Summary Verdict =====
ax6 = fig.add_subplot(gs[1, 2])
ax6.axis('off')
verdict_text = """VERDICT: REFUTED

Failure Mode: #1 (Granularity)
  Family-vs-subfamily error

Query protein: UGT85A subfamily
  • 58% identity to iridoid GlcTs
  • Intact PSPG motif (pLDDT 97.5)
  • Closest: 7-DLGT (Catharanthus)

Propagated term: GO:0080043
  quercetin 3-O-GlcT activity
  • Only 27% identity to UGT78D1
  • 0/23 experimental in UGT85
  • 28,355 automated annotations

Correct term: GO:0035251
  UDP-glucosyltransferase activity
  (pending experimental assay)

Best-characterized UGT85A:
  UGT85A1 → cytokinin GlcT (IDA)
  UGT85A24 → iridoid GlcT (IDA)
  UGT85A96/98 → volatile GlcT"""

ax6.text(0.05, 0.95, verdict_text, transform=ax6.transAxes, fontsize=9,
         verticalalignment='top', fontfamily='monospace',
         bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.5', facecolor='lightyellow', edgecolor='black', linewidth=1.5))
ax6.set_title('F. Summary', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold')

# Legend
blue_patch = mpatches.Patch(color='#2196F3', label='Iridoid GlcTs')
green_patch = mpatches.Patch(color='#4CAF50', label='UGT85A family')
red_patch = mpatches.Patch(color='#F44336', label='Quercetin GlcTs (GO:0080043)')
fig.legend(handles=[blue_patch, green_patch, red_patch], 
           loc='lower center', ncol=3, fontsize=10, bbox_to_anchor=(0.5, 0.01))

plt.savefig('final_evidence_summary.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Final comprehensive figure saved")
